privileged_info_summary: The demodb database schema includes four required classes: Hotels, Profiles, Restaurants, and Countries. The database is populated with 15 hotel records including Hotel Artemide (Rome), Hotel Adlon Kempinski (Berlin), and Park Hyatt Tokyo (Tokyo). The database contains 17 user profiles including john.smith@example.com. Country records include Italy and 11 other nations. All data is seeded via a Python script (seed_demodb.py) that generates synthetic but realistic travel agency data based on real-world hotel and restaurant names.
